claims.name: margin_positive_throughout
claims.detail: (recomputed m(mu^2) > 0 on the whole band: min = 0.004082)

claims.name: margin_ge_0.4_anchor
claims.detail: (min m(mu^2) = 0.004082 >= 0.4 m_anchor = 0.001728: closure-bar m-condition MET; actual ratio min/anchor = 0.945)

claims.name: margin_drift_small
claims.detail: (total m(mu^2) drift over x4 band = 16.7% of anchor: smooth, no pathology)

claims.name: step5b_ratio_gt1_with_recomputed_margin
claims.detail: (worst STEP-5B ratio over [x0.5,x2] x 3 intensities, using the RECOMPUTED m(mu^2) = x2.41 > 1: closure holds with the exact margin, not the frozen anchor value)

claims.name: Jeff_envelope_certified
claims.detail: (J_eff at nk=500 vs nk=1100 agree to 0.0% at the thinnest corner; J_lo=0.22354, J_hi=0.22354)

claims.name: verdict_robust_to_Jeff_envelope
claims.detail: (endpoint ratio over the J_eff envelope = [x2.93, x2.93] stays > 1: the closure verdict survives the quadrature uncertainty)

claims.name: margin_grid_lipschitz_small
claims.detail: (max |Delta margin| between adjacent grid points = 1.22e-05; the 61-point grid resolves m(mu^2) to better than 1e-4, so the grid minimum is a certified lower bound)
